name: ElevenLabs Text to Speech
author: BruControl
description: Speaks text using the ElevenLabs cloud API via BruControl.fetchExternal server proxy (add api.elevenlabs.io to ExternalFetch:AllowedHosts). Set API key and voice ID in element settings. Audio is pre-fetched when text or voice changes; set speak true to play. Resets speak to false after playback.
